---
title: "🏫 School"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Fira+Code:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="../shared/_styles.css">
---

```{=html}
<div id="top-navbar">
  <div id="nav-title">
    🇩🇪 German A1 Language
    <span class="subtitle">Beginner Study Notes · <a href="../index.html" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none">← Back to Home</a></span>
  </div>
  <!-- AUTO-NAV-START -->
<div id="nav-tabs">
    <a class="nav-tab" href="alphabet.html">🔤 Alphabet</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="colors.html">🎨 Colors</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="communication.html">🗣️ Communication</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="countries.html">🌍 Countries & Languages</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="family.html">👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="game.html">🎮 Noun Flashcard Game</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="grammar.html">📐 Grammar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="hobbies.html">🎯 Hobbies</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="komposita.html">🔗 Komposita</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="numbers.html">🔢 Numbers</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="personal.html">👤 Personal Info</a>
    <a class="nav-tab active" href="school.html">🏫 School</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="time.html">📅 Time & Calendar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="flashcards.html">🃏 Flashcard Game</a>
</div>
<!-- AUTO-NAV-END -->
  <div id="nav-dropdown"></div>
</div>
<script src="../shared/_app.js"></script>

<div id="main-content">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="flags">🇩🇪 🇦🇹 🇨🇭</div>
    <h1>🏫 School</h1>
    <p>German A1 Study Notes · Beginner Level · <a href="../index.html" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)">← All Topics</a></p>
  </div>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ SECTION: School ═══════════════════════════ -->

::: {#sec-school }

```{=html}
<div class="topic-banner">
  <div><span class="de-article">die</span><span class="de-word">Schule</span></div>
  <div class="pron-word">[SHOO-leh]</div>
  <div class="en-word">School</div>
</div>
```

## School Vocabulary {#sub-schoolvocab}

| German | Pronunciation | English |
|--------|---------------|---------|
| die Schule | [dee SHOO-leh] | school |
| das Fach / die Fächer | [dass fakh / dee FEH-kher] | subject / subjects |
| der Stundenplan | [dare SHTOON-den-plan] | timetable |
| die Stunde | [dee SHTOON-deh] | period (1 hour) |
| die Pause | [dee POW-zeh] | break / interval |
| die Klasse | [dee KLAS-seh] | class |
| frei | [fry] | free (no class) |

---

## School Subjects {#sub-subjects}

```{=html}
<div class="vocab-grid">
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Mathematik</div><div class="en">Mathematics</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Deutsch</div><div class="en">German</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Englisch</div><div class="en">English</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Französisch</div><div class="en">French</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Spanisch</div><div class="en">Spanish</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Geographie</div><div class="en">Geography</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Geschichte</div><div class="en">History</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Physik</div><div class="en">Physics</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Chemie</div><div class="en">Chemistry</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Biologie</div><div class="en">Biology</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Informatik</div><div class="en">IT / Computer Science</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Kunst</div><div class="en">Art</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Musik</div><div class="en">Music</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Sport</div><div class="en">Physical Education</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Religion</div><div class="en">Religious Studies</div></div>
  <div class="vocab-card"><div class="de">Literatur</div><div class="en">Literature</div></div>
</div>
```

---

## Talking About Your Timetable {#sub-timetable}

| German | English |
|--------|---------|
| Am Montag habe ich zwei Stunden Religion. | On Monday I have two periods of Religion. |
| Wann hast du Mathematik? | When do you have Mathematics? |
| Am Montag in der ersten Stunde habe ich ___. | On Monday in the first period I have ___. |
| Am Freitag in der vierten Stunde habe ich frei. | On Friday in the fourth period I have a free period. |
| Jeden Tag habe ich ___. | Every day I have ___. |

### Ordinal Numbers for Periods

| Ordinal | German | English |
|---------|--------|---------|
| 1. | erste(n) | first |
| 2. | zweite(n) | second |
| 3. | dritte(n) | third |
| 4. | vierte(n) | fourth |
| 5. | fünfte(n) | fifth |
| 6. | sechste(n) | sixth |
| 7. | siebte(n) | seventh |
| 8. | achte(n) | eighth |

---

## Classroom Objects {#sub-classobj}

| German | Article | English | German | Article | English |
|--------|---------|---------|--------|---------|---------|
| Tafel | die | blackboard | Stift | der | pen/marker |
| Tasche | die | bag | Bleistift | der | pencil |
| Laptop | das | laptop | Radiergummi | der | eraser |
| Fenster | das | window | Tisch | der | table |
| Tür | die | door | Stuhl | der | chair |
| Kuli | der | ballpoint pen | Uhr | die | clock |
| Buch | das | book | Heft | das | notebook |
| Rucksack | der | backpack | Lineal | das | ruler |
| Computer | der | computer | Handy | das | mobile phone |

---

## Classroom Language {#sub-classlang}

| German | English |
|--------|---------|
| Lesen Sie bitte vor. | Please read aloud. |
| Noch einmal, bitte. | Once more, please. |
| Ergänzen Sie. | Fill in / Complete. |
| Wie heißt das auf Deutsch? | How do you say that in German? |
| Können Sie das wiederholen, bitte? | Can you repeat that, please? |
| Ich verstehe das nicht. | I don't understand that. |
| Ich brauche Hilfe. | I need help. |
| Was sind die Hausaufgaben? | What is the homework? |
| Wann ist die Pause? | When is the break? |
| Darf ich kurz auf die Toilette gehen? | May I quickly go to the toilet? |

---

## Class Exercises — Bitte schreiben Sie die Sätze {#sub-classexercise}

::: {.callout-tip}
These sentence patterns come from class notebook exercises. Each picture prompt shows an object, and you practise **Ist das ein/eine …?** (singular) and **Sind das …?** (plural).
:::

### Pattern: Singular — Ist das ein …? / Nein, das ist kein …

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;margin:1rem 0;">

  <div style="background:#fff;border:2px solid #e9d5ff;border-radius:14px;padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
    <div style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:#9333ea;margin-bottom:.4rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">das Auto / der Bus 🚗</div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#5b21b6;font-weight:700">Ist das ein Auto?</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Is that a car?</span></div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#0369a1;font-weight:700">Ja, das ist ein Auto.</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Yes, that is a car.</span></div>
    <hr style="border-color:#e9d5ff;margin:.5rem 0">
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#5b21b6;font-weight:700">Ist das ein Bus?</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Is that a bus?</span></div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#0369a1;font-weight:700">Nein, das ist kein Bus. Das ist ein Auto.</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— No, that is not a bus. That is a car.</span></div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border:2px solid #e9d5ff;border-radius:14px;padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
    <div style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:#9333ea;margin-bottom:.4rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">der Mann / die Frau 🧍</div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#5b21b6;font-weight:700">Ist das eine Frau?</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Is that a woman?</span></div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#0369a1;font-weight:700">Nein, das ist keine Frau. Das ist ein Mann.</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— No, that is not a woman. That is a man.</span></div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border:2px solid #e9d5ff;border-radius:14px;padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
    <div style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:#9333ea;margin-bottom:.4rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">der Computer / das Buch 💻</div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#5b21b6;font-weight:700">Ist das ein Buch?</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Is that a book?</span></div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#0369a1;font-weight:700">Nein, das ist kein Buch. Das ist ein Computer.</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— No, that is not a book. That is a computer.</span></div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border:2px solid #e9d5ff;border-radius:14px;padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
    <div style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:#9333ea;margin-bottom:.4rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">der Bleistift / die Schere ✏️</div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#5b21b6;font-weight:700">Ist das eine Schere?</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Is that a pair of scissors?</span></div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#0369a1;font-weight:700">Nein, das ist keine Schere. Das ist ein Bleistift.</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— No, that is not scissors. That is a pencil.</span></div>
  </div>

</div>
```

### Pattern: Plural — Sind das …? / Nein, das sind keine …

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;margin:1rem 0;">

  <div style="background:#fff;border:2px solid #e9d5ff;border-radius:14px;padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
    <div style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:#9333ea;margin-bottom:.4rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">die Flaschen 🍾🍾🍾</div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#5b21b6;font-weight:700">Sind das Flaschen?</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Are those bottles?</span></div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#0369a1;font-weight:700">Ja, das sind Flaschen.</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Yes, those are bottles.</span></div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#fff;border:2px solid #e9d5ff;border-radius:14px;padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
    <div style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:#9333ea;margin-bottom:.4rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em">die Flaschen / die Kulis 🍾 / 🖊️</div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#5b21b6;font-weight:700">Sind das Kulis?</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— Are those ballpoint pens?</span></div>
    <div style="margin:.2rem 0"><span style="color:#0369a1;font-weight:700">Nein, das sind keine Kulis. Das sind Flaschen.</span> <span style="color:#6b7280;font-size:.88rem">— No, those are not pens. Those are bottles.</span></div>
  </div>

</div>
```

::: {.callout-note}
**Key grammar note — kein / keine:**  
Use **kein** to negate nouns with **der** or **das** articles.  
Use **keine** to negate nouns with **die** articles (including all plurals).

| Article | Positive | Negative |
|---------|----------|----------|
| der (m) | ein Mann | kein Mann |
| die (f) | eine Frau | keine Frau |
| das (n) | ein Auto | kein Auto |
| Plural | — Flaschen | keine Flaschen |
:::

:::


```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:3rem;padding:1.5rem;color:#9333ea;font-size:.9rem;">
  <a href="../index.html" style="color:#7c3aed;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none">← Back to All Topics</a>
  &nbsp;·&nbsp; <em>Viel Erfolg!</em> (Good luck!)
</div>
</div><!-- /main-content -->
```
